351 J1L J1L_SHORT_BREATH (J1L) Shortness of Breath CHAR 1 Health conditions: problem conditions - other - shortness of breath in last 7 days. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
352 J1M J1M_SYNCOPE (J1M) Syncope/Fainting CHAR 1 Health conditions: problem conditions - other - syncope (fainting) in last 7 days. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
353 J1N J1N_UNSTEADY_GAIT (J1N) Unsteady Gait CHAR 1 Health conditions: problem conditions - other - unsteady
